title: Telangana Budget 2026-27 LIVE: Finance Minister Bhatti likely to walk a tightrope balancing welfare and development
content:
Telangana Finance Minister Bhatti is set to present the state's 2026-27 Budget.
*   The budget is expected to focus on a challenging balancing act between welfare programs and development initiatives.
*   Bhatti will likely have to navigate carefully to satisfy both social commitments and economic growth objectives.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Malampuzha poised for LDF-BJP rematch, UDF takes desperate gamble
content:
The Malampuzha constituency in the 2026 Kerala Assembly Elections is predicted to see a direct rematch between the LDF and BJP.
*   The UDF is described as making a "desperate gamble" in this particular contest.
*   This suggests the UDF is taking a high-stakes, uncertain approach to challenge what is largely anticipated to be a two-way rivalry.

title: Assembly elections 2026 LIVE: Assam CM Himanta, other key candidates to file nominations on March 20
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Preparation is underway for the 2026 Assembly elections in Assam.
*   Assam CM Himanta and other significant candidates are set to file their nominations.
*   The filing of these nominations is scheduled for March 20.

title: Defectors from Congress in BJP’s first list of 88 candidates for Assam election
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The BJP has announced its first list of 88 candidates for the upcoming Assam election.
*   A significant number of candidates on this list are individuals who have defected from the Congress party.
*   This indicates the BJP's strategy of incorporating former Congress members into its electoral lineup for the state.

title: Budget will be acceptable to all sections of society, says  Deputy Chief Minister
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   The Deputy Chief Minister has expressed confidence in the upcoming budget.
*   He states that the budget is designed to be acceptable to all segments of society.
*   This suggests the budget aims for widespread appeal and inclusivity across different groups.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: The Left grapples with shifting loyalties
content:
The Left political front in Kerala is currently facing a significant challenge.
*   This struggle centers on a noticeable shift in loyalties among its traditional voter base.
*   The party is grappling with these changes in preparation for the 2026 Kerala Assembly Elections.

title: Delhi court acquits two booked under UAPA after they spent eight years in jail
content:
A Delhi court has acquitted two individuals.
*   The individuals had been booked under the stringent UAPA law.
*   They were acquitted after spending eight years in jail.

title: Collective of Tamil Creators, Readers, and Social Activists demands withdrawal of Jnanpith Award to Vairamuthu
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   A collective of Tamil creators, readers, and social activists has formed.
*   They are demanding the withdrawal of the Jnanpith Award.
*   This demand specifically targets the award that was given to Vairamuthu.

title: Facing evictions, Gulmarg hoteliers withdraw petitions ‘to settle issue with J&K Govt.’
content:
Gulmarg hoteliers are currently facing the threat of eviction from their properties.
*   They have decided to withdraw the legal petitions they had previously filed.
*   This withdrawal is intended to facilitate a direct settlement of their issues with the Jammu and Kashmir Government.

title: 24 States, U.T.s set aside funds for new rural jobs scheme
content:
24 states and Union Territories have committed financial resources.
*   These funds are specifically designated for a new employment initiative.
*   The scheme aims to create jobs in rural areas.
